records.ety: [LL. bovinus, fr. L. bos, bovis, ox, cow: cf. F. bovine. See Cow.]

defs: Of or pertaining to the genus Bos; relating to, or resembling, the ox or cow; oxlike; as, the bovine genus; a bovine antelope.
Having qualities characteristic of oxen or cows; sluggish and patient; dull; as, a bovine temperament.
quotes: The bovine gaze of gaping rustics.
